name: Cumulative Benefit Stack
description: Plain headline → 5 benefit pills that stack and stay on screen together (first orange, rest blue) → hard swap to CTA. No logos anywhere.
previewVideoPath: reference/singapore nvo 1 june - singapore under 60 secs.mp4

defaultProofLine: Fast-moving career benefits in a global city

questions.prompt: Benefit pill 1 of 5 — this one renders in the accent (orange) color, e.g. "Asia's finance capital"
